117:
I mention this because the volumes which Yayake took were wholly without ornament─meaning that Mumuepo desired them for their content and not their form. I fear something terrible lurks in those pages, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>─something which Mumuepo alone may be capable of discovering...
<sigh> There is nothing for it─the prelate must be made to talk.
